name: Bobblehead Generator from Selfie
body:
---
title: Bobblehead Generator from Selfie
category: 3d

author: '[@thisdudelikesAI](https://x.com/thisdudelikesAI)'

---

Turn this photo into a bobblehead: enlarge the head slightly, keep the face accurate and cartoonify the body. [Place it on a bookshelf].

## Notes
Please replace [Place it on a bookshelf] in the prompt with your desired specific scene or background, for example "Place it on a bookshelf" or "Place it on an office desk", or "Place it on a neutral background" or "Generate with a transparent background".

## Reference Image
A selfie needs to be uploaded as the basis for generating the bobblehead.

## Source
- [Original Post](https://x.com/thisdudelikesAI/status/1920433372243136730)

## Example Output
![Bobblehead Generator from Selfie](/media/3d/bobblehead-generator-from-selfie.webp)
description_en: An image-generation prompt that turns a selfie into a bobblehead figure with an enlarged head and cartoonified body.
description_zh: 一个图像生成提示词，把自拍照变成头部放大、身体卡通化的摇头娃娃手办。
long_en: The prompt enlarges the subject's head, keeps the face accurate, cartoonifies the body, and places the bobblehead in a user-specified scene via a bracketed placeholder (e.g. on a bookshelf or a transparent background). It works from an uploaded selfie.
long_zh: 提示词放大主体头部、保持面部相似、把身体卡通化，并通过方括号占位符把摇头娃娃放进用户指定的场景（如书架上或透明背景），以上传的自拍照为基础。
sec_note_en: Requires an image-generation model and uploading a personal selfie to a third-party service; no code execution.
sec_note_zh: 需要图像生成模型，并将个人自拍上传到第三方服务；不执行任何代码。
